title: ML Engineer
description: Neuron Labs is an AI-first startup building the next generation of intelligent document processing. We need an ML Engineer to own the full lifecycle of our NLP models — from data collection and training through to production serving. You'll work directly with the founders and have massive impact on product direction.
responsibilities: Train and fine-tune NLP models for document understanding tasks
Build and maintain MLOps pipeline for automated retraining and deployment
Optimize model inference latency for production (<100ms p99)
Work with product team to define ML-driven features
